issues.detail: Skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Skill is vendor-locked to Codex CLI, not generic for any AI agent.

scenarios.name: Set up Codex CLI in suggest mode with project conventions
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to confuse Codex CLI with GitHub Copilot CLI and misses the project-context mechanism, while treatment uses npm install -g @openai/codex, --approval-mode suggest, and a checked-in codex.md as documented.

scenarios.name: Sandbox Codex CLI to ./src and ./tests with no network
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for Docker or seccomp wrappers instead of the built-in config, while treatment edits ~/.codex/config.yaml setting sandbox.enabled, sandbox.network false, and sandbox.writable_paths exactly as documented.
